title: Villager's October
description: It's halloween in the minecraft village! Come and celebrate autumn with the villagers!
body: # Villager's October It is autumn time! The villagers have decorated their village to celebrate autumn and Halloween. Come and join them! Villages have been decorated with autumn related stuff like scarecrows, garland or tiny floating ghast-balloons. Also some villages have a new house made from a giant pumpkin. That's where you can find the *madman*, a new type of villager. To really enjoy the Halloween experience, put on one of three Halloween costumes and go from door to door in the village at night, ringing the bells to get some candy from the fellow villagers. What are you waiting, for? The villagers are looking forward to celebrate with you! Made for [SpookyJam 2022](https://spooky-jam.com/events/2022).
